## Bugfix: Summary

Describe the bug and how this change fixes it. Link to the issue and any relevant logs.

Fixes: #<issue-id>

## Reproduction Steps
How to reproduce the issue prior to this fix.

## Changes
- Key code changes
- Added tests/regressions

## Tests
- [ ] Failing test reproduced
- [ ] Tests pass after fix (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] Edge cases covered

## Checklist
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Lint/format OK
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Added notes to README/AGENTS.md if needed

## Risk/Impact
Any potential side effects or migrations required.
